## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what went wrong.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. `ccjump …`
2. Then `…`
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual output

```text
paste the exact terminal output / error here
```

## Environment

- ccjump version: <!-- `ccjump --version` -->
- OS / distro: <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 14, Windows 11 + WSL/Git Bash -->
- Shell: <!-- bash or zsh, and the version (`bash --version` / `zsh --version`) -->
- Installed via: <!-- install.sh / built from source -->
- `claude` on PATH: <!-- yes/no; `claude --version` if relevant -->

## Config (optional, redact paths if needed)

```jsonc
// contents of ${XDG_CONFIG_HOME:-~/.config}/ccjump/config.json
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — e.g. a custom `$PATH`, oh-my-zsh, conda, an unusual `XDG_CONFIG_HOME`.
